subcodes.first_line: O Jacob! The divine Joseph hath been encompassed by the wolves of the earth, and the Desired One of the world is afflicted amidst the peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یعقوب یوسف الهی را ذئاب ارض احاطه نموده و مقصود عالم بین امم مبتلا در این
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
